title: Unsupported: virtual interface never assigned any actual interface

features.name: virtual interface declaration in class
features.description: Code should include a class with a virtual interface member declared using modport type but never assigned an actual interface instance

features.name: virtual interface as function argument
features.description: Code should include a function or constructor with virtual interface parameters using modport types

features.name: interface with modport declarations
features.description: Code should include an interface definition with multiple modport declarations for different signal directions
